Aquila SmartGrid Service Desk & Asset Intelligence Platform - Plain Text Operations Corpus ======================================================================================== Generated: 2026-05-31 Purpose: stress-test text parsers, chunkers, metadata extraction, retrieval, and answer grounding.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY ----------------- The Aquila platform consolidates incident telemetry, asset registers, customer notices, and compliance evidence across regional substations. This corpus is synthetic but structured like enterprise knowledge-base material.

RETRIEVAL TARGETS ----------------- RAG systems should retrieve exact policy language, numeric thresholds, named exceptions, code snippets, dates, and owner mappings. Some facts are repeated with slight variations to test deduplication and source ranking.

KNOWN AMBIGUITIES ----------------- The term 'feeder' may refer to an electrical feeder, a data ingestion feeder, or a Kafka feeder service. The term 'breaker' may refer to circuit breaker hardware or software circuit breaker logic.

INCIDENT RESPONSE MATRIX

ID Severity Trigger SLA Owner ---- -------- -------------------------------------------- ------------------- ------------ P-001 P1 Critical outage escalation 10 minutes GridOps Lead P-002 P2 Data retention 20 minutes Data Governance P-003 P3 Maintenance freeze 30 minutes Maintenance Director P-004 P4 Password rotation exception 40 minutes Security Engineering P-005 P5 Model-assisted triage 50 minutes Service Desk Manager

LONG-FORM PROCEDURE WITH SUBSECTIONS

2.1 Step 1: verification checkpoint Before closing checkpoint 1, verify telemetry freshness, asset identity, duplicate ticket status, and safety flags. For ambiguous terms such as feeder, breaker, relay, and gateway, preserve the local context window. Checkpoint 1 includes a deliberately long paragraph to test chunk overlap behavior and sentence boundary splitting across formats.

Hyphen variants: zero-trust, zero trust, zero–trust.

Currency values: AED 12,450.75; USD 3,999.99; INR 82,10,000.

Dates: 2026-05-31, 31/05/2026, May 31st 2026, FY26-Q2.

| Policy ID | Policy | Exact Rule | Owner | Evidence Required |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `P-001` | Critical outage escalation | P1 incidents affecting more than 5,000 meters must be escalated to GridOps within 10 minutes and to the regulator within 45 minutes if restoration estimate exceeds 2 hours. | GridOps Lead | ticket, approval note, timestamp |
| `P-002` | Data retention | Raw telemetry is retained for 18 months. Aggregated hourly metrics are retained for 7 years. Customer-identifiable exports must expire after 30 days. | Data Governance | ticket, approval note, timestamp |
| `P-003` | Maintenance freeze | No non-emergency transformer maintenance may be started during the June peak-load freeze window unless approved by both Operations and Compliance. | Maintenance Director | ticket, approval note, timestamp |
| `P-004` | Password rotation exception | Service accounts used by field gateways rotate every 90 days, except offline substations in satellite mode which rotate at the next successful sync within 14 days. | Security Engineering | ticket, approval note, timestamp |
| `P-005` | Model-assisted triage | AI triage suggestions are advisory. Human dispatchers must confirm safety classification before a field crew is assigned. | Service Desk Manager | ticket, approval note, timestamp |
parent_path: Aquila SmartGrid Service Desk & Asset Intelligence Platform

  "routing": ["GridOps", "Regulatory Affairs"]
}

def should_escalate(affected_meters: int, eta_minutes: int) -> bool:

Section: Aquila SmartGrid Service Desk & Asset Intelligence Platform > Nested Procedure

Nested Procedure

Intake

Validate source system: SCADA, AMI, CRM, or manual field call.

Normalize asset identifier. Example aliases: `TX-0091`, `Transformer 91`, `TRF_91`.

Capture confidence score:

High: direct telemetry + operator confirmation.

Medium: telemetry only.

Low: customer report only.

Triage

Check duplicate tickets within a 20-minute rolling window.

Apply policy `P-005` for AI-assisted triage.

Safety labels must be human-confirmed.

Dispatch

Use the closest qualified crew.

Do not dispatch during a lightning alert unless emergency override is approved.

Section: Document Control

Aquila SmartGrid Service Desk & Asset Intelligence Platform
DOCX Procedure, Compliance, and Retrieval Fixture

Generated: 2026-05-31 | Classification: Synthetic test data | Version: 2.7

This document intentionally contains long prose, short facts, repeated facts, tables, nested lists, special characters, and page breaks to evaluate DOCX extraction quality.

Document: Document Control
Section: Document Control

Document Control

| Field | Value | Owner | Retrieval Note |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| System | Aquila SmartGrid Service Desk & Asset Intelligence Platform | Platform Office | Title-level metadata should be captured. |
| Review cadence | Quarterly | Compliance | Cadence is a direct answer target. |
| Primary policy IDs | P-001 through P-005 | Governance | Policy IDs appear in table and prose. |

Document: Document Control
Section: Executive Summary

Executive Summary

The Aquila platform consolidates incident telemetry, asset registers, customer notices, and compliance evidence across regional substations. This corpus is synthetic but structured like enterprise knowledge-base material.

Edge case 1: Mixed casing: SCADA, Scada, scada.

Edge case 2: Hyphen variants: zero-trust, zero trust, zero–trust.

Edge case 3: Currency values: AED 12,450.75; USD 3,999.99; INR 82,10,000.

Edge case 4: Dates: 2026-05-31, 31/05/2026, May 31st 2026, FY26-Q2.

Edge case 5: Unicode: café, naïve, München, 東京, القاهرة, मराठी, हिंदी.

Document: Document Control
Section: Retrieval Targets

Retrieval Targets

RAG systems should retrieve exact policy language, numeric thresholds, named exceptions, code snippets, dates, and owner mappings. Some facts are repeated with slight variations to test deduplication and source ranking.

Edge case 1: Mixed casing: SCADA, Scada, scada.

Edge case 2: Hyphen variants: zero-trust, zero trust, zero–trust.

Edge case 3: Currency values: AED 12,450.75; USD 3,999.99; INR 82,10,000.

Edge case 4: Dates: 2026-05-31, 31/05/2026, May 31st 2026, FY26-Q2.

Edge case 5: Unicode: café, naïve, München, 東京, القاهرة, मराठी, हिंदी.

Document: Document Control
Section: Known Ambiguities

Known Ambiguities

The term 'feeder' may refer to an electrical feeder, a data ingestion feeder, or a Kafka feeder service. The term 'breaker' may refer to circuit breaker hardware or software circuit breaker logic.

Edge case 1: Mixed casing: SCADA, Scada, scada.

Edge case 2: Hyphen variants: zero-trust, zero trust, zero–trust.

Edge case 3: Currency values: AED 12,450.75; USD 3,999.99; INR 82,10,000.

Edge case 4: Dates: 2026-05-31, 31/05/2026, May 31st 2026, FY26-Q2.

Edge case 5: Unicode: café, naïve, München, 東京, القاهرة, मराठी, हिंदी.

Document: Document Control
Section: Policy Register

Policy Register

| Policy ID | Title | Exact Rule | Owner | Retrieval Difficulty |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| P-001 | Critical outage escalation | P1 incidents affecting more than 5,000 meters must be escalated to GridOps within 10 minutes and to the regulator within 45 minutes if restoration estimate exceeds 2 hours. | GridOps Lead | Exact numeric or exception retrieval |
| P-002 | Data retention | Raw telemetry is retained for 18 months. Aggregated hourly metrics are retained for 7 years. Customer-identifiable exports must expire after 30 days. | Data Governance | Exact numeric or exception retrieval |
| P-003 | Maintenance freeze | No non-emergency transformer maintenance may be started during the June peak-load freeze window unless approved by both Operations and Compliance. | Maintenance Director | Exact numeric or exception retrieval |
| P-004 | Password rotation exception | Service accounts used by field gateways rotate every 90 days, except offline substations in satellite mode which rotate at the next successful sync within 14 days. | Security Engineering | Exact numeric or exception retrieval |
| P-005 | Model-assisted triage | AI triage suggestions are advisory. Human dispatchers must confirm safety classification before a field crew is assigned. | Service Desk Manager | Exact numeric or exception retrieval |

Document: Document Control

Section: Document Control

Aquila SmartGrid Service Desk & Asset Intelligence Platform
DOCX Procedure, Compliance, and Retrieval Fixture

Generated: 2026-05-31 | Classification: Synthetic test data | Version: 2.7

This document intentionally contains long prose, short facts, repeated facts, tables, nested lists, special characters, and page breaks to evaluate DOCX extraction quality.

Document: Document Control
Section: Document Control

Document Control

| Field | Value | Owner | Retrieval Note |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| System | Aquila SmartGrid Service Desk & Asset Intelligence Platform | Platform Office | Title-level metadata should be captured. |
| Review cadence | Quarterly | Compliance | Cadence is a direct answer target. |
| Primary policy IDs | P-001 through P-005 | Governance | Policy IDs appear in table and prose. |

Document: Document Control
Section: Executive Summary

Executive Summary

The Aquila platform consolidates incident telemetry, asset registers, customer notices, and compliance evidence across regional substations. This corpus is synthetic but structured like enterprise knowledge-base material.

Edge case 1: Mixed casing: SCADA, Scada, scada.

Edge case 2: Hyphen variants: zero-trust, zero trust, zero–trust.

Edge case 3: Currency values: AED 12,450.75; USD 3,999.99; INR 82,10,000.

Edge case 4: Dates: 2026-05-31, 31/05/2026, May 31st 2026, FY26-Q2.

Edge case 5: Unicode: café, naïve, München, 東京, القاهرة, मराठी, हिंदी.

Document: Document Control
Section: Retrieval Targets

Retrieval Targets

RAG systems should retrieve exact policy language, numeric thresholds, named exceptions, code snippets, dates, and owner mappings. Some facts are repeated with slight variations to test deduplication and source ranking.

Edge case 1: Mixed casing: SCADA, Scada, scada.

Edge case 2: Hyphen variants: zero-trust, zero trust, zero–trust.

Edge case 3: Currency values: AED 12,450.75; USD 3,999.99; INR 82,10,000.

Edge case 4: Dates: 2026-05-31, 31/05/2026, May 31st 2026, FY26-Q2.

Edge case 5: Unicode: café, naïve, München, 東京, القاهرة, मराठी, हिंदी.

Document: Document Control
Section: Known Ambiguities

Known Ambiguities

The term 'feeder' may refer to an electrical feeder, a data ingestion feeder, or a Kafka feeder service. The term 'breaker' may refer to circuit breaker hardware or software circuit breaker logic.

Edge case 1: Mixed casing: SCADA, Scada, scada.

Edge case 2: Hyphen variants: zero-trust, zero trust, zero–trust.

Edge case 3: Currency values: AED 12,450.75; USD 3,999.99; INR 82,10,000.

Edge case 4: Dates: 2026-05-31, 31/05/2026, May 31st 2026, FY26-Q2.

Edge case 5: Unicode: café, naïve, München, 東京, القاهرة, मराठी, हिंदी.

Document: Document Control
Section: Policy Register

Policy Register

| Policy ID | Title | Exact Rule | Owner | Retrieval Difficulty |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| P-001 | Critical outage escalation | P1 incidents affecting more than 5,000 meters must be escalated to GridOps within 10 minutes and to the regulator within 45 minutes if restoration estimate exceeds 2 hours. | GridOps Lead | Exact numeric or exception retrieval |
| P-002 | Data retention | Raw telemetry is retained for 18 months. Aggregated hourly metrics are retained for 7 years. Customer-identifiable exports must expire after 30 days. | Data Governance | Exact numeric or exception retrieval |
| P-003 | Maintenance freeze | No non-emergency transformer maintenance may be started during the June peak-load freeze window unless approved by both Operations and Compliance. | Maintenance Director | Exact numeric or exception retrieval |
| P-004 | Password rotation exception | Service accounts used by field gateways rotate every 90 days, except offline substations in satellite mode which rotate at the next successful sync within 14 days. | Security Engineering | Exact numeric or exception retrieval |
| P-005 | Model-assisted triage | AI triage suggestions are advisory. Human dispatchers must confirm safety classification before a field crew is assigned. | Service Desk Manager | Exact numeric or exception retrieval |

Section: Policies

Policies

Policy ID: P-001 | Title: Critical outage escalation | Exact Rule: P1 incidents affecting more than 5,000 meters must be escalated to GridOps within 10 minutes and to the regulator within 45 minutes if restoration estimate exceeds 2 hours. | Owner: GridOps Lead | Active: true | Review Date: 2026-05-31T00:00:00

Policy ID: P-002 | Title: Data retention | Exact Rule: Raw telemetry is retained for 18 months. Aggregated hourly metrics are retained for 7 years. Customer-identifiable exports must expire after 30 days. | Owner: Data Governance | Active: true | Review Date: 2026-05-31T00:00:00

Policy ID: P-003 | Title: Maintenance freeze | Exact Rule: No non-emergency transformer maintenance may be started during the June peak-load freeze window unless approved by both Operations and Compliance. | Owner: Maintenance Director | Active: true | Review Date: 2026-05-31T00:00:00

Policy ID: P-004 | Title: Password rotation exception | Exact Rule: Service accounts used by field gateways rotate every 90 days, except offline substations in satellite mode which rotate at the next successful sync within 14 days. | Owner: Security Engineering | Active: true | Review Date: 2026-05-31T00:00:00

Policy ID: P-005 | Title: Model-assisted triage | Exact Rule: AI triage suggestions are advisory. Human dispatchers must confirm safety classification before a field crew is assigned. | Owner: Service Desk Manager | Active: true | Review Date: 2026-05-31T00:00:00

Document: 07_aquila_spreadsheet_fixture
Section: Policies

Policies

Policy ID: P-001 | Title: Critical outage escalation | Exact Rule: P1 incidents affecting more than 5,000 meters must be escalated to GridOps within 10 minutes and to the regulator within 45 minutes if restoration estimate exceeds 2 hours. | Owner: GridOps Lead | Active: true | Review Date: 2026-05-31T00:00:00

Policy ID: P-002 | Title: Data retention | Exact Rule: Raw telemetry is retained for 18 months. Aggregated hourly metrics are retained for 7 years. Customer-identifiable exports must expire after 30 days. | Owner: Data Governance | Active: true | Review Date: 2026-05-31T00:00:00

Policy ID: P-003 | Title: Maintenance freeze | Exact Rule: No non-emergency transformer maintenance may be started during the June peak-load freeze window unless approved by both Operations and Compliance. | Owner: Maintenance Director | Active: true | Review Date: 2026-05-31T00:00:00

Policy ID: P-004 | Title: Password rotation exception | Exact Rule: Service accounts used by field gateways rotate every 90 days, except offline substations in satellite mode which rotate at the next successful sync within 14 days. | Owner: Security Engineering | Active: true | Review Date: 2026-05-31T00:00:00

Policy ID: P-005 | Title: Model-assisted triage | Exact Rule: AI triage suggestions are advisory. Human dispatchers must confirm safety classification before a field crew is assigned. | Owner: Service Desk Manager | Active: true | Review Date: 2026-05-31T00:00:00

parent_chunks.text:
Document: 09_aquila_nested_corpus
Section: $ > policies > [0]

$.policies[0].id: "P-001"

$.policies[0].title: "Critical outage escalation"

$.policies[0].rule: "P1 incidents affecting more than 5,000 meters must be escalated to GridOps within 10 minutes and to the regulator within 45 minutes if restoration estimate exceeds 2 hours."

$.policies[0].owner: "GridOps Lead"

$.policies[0].active: true

[]

Document: 09_aquila_nested_corpus
Section: $ > policies > [1]

$.policies[1].id: "P-002"

$.policies[1].title: "Data retention"

$.policies[1].rule: "Raw telemetry is retained for 18 months. Aggregated hourly metrics are retained for 7 years. Customer-identifiable exports must expire after 30 days."

$.policies[1].owner: "Data Governance"

$.policies[1].active: true

[]

Document: 09_aquila_nested_corpus
Section: $ > policies > [2]

$.policies[2].id: "P-003"

$.policies[2].title: "Maintenance freeze"

$.policies[2].rule: "No non-emergency transformer maintenance may be started during the June peak-load freeze window unless approved by both Operations and Compliance."

$.policies[2].owner: "Maintenance Director"

$.policies[2].active: true

[]

Document: 09_aquila_nested_corpus
Section: $ > policies > [3]

$.policies[3].id: "P-004"

$.policies[3].title: "Password rotation exception"

$.policies[3].rule: "Service accounts used by field gateways rotate every 90 days, except offline substations in satellite mode which rotate at the next successful sync within 14 days."

$.policies[3].owner: "Security Engineering"

$.policies[3].active: true

[]

Document: 09_aquila_nested_corpus
Section: $ > policies > [4]

Document: 09_aquila_nested_corpus
Section: $ > policies > [0]

$.policies[0].id: "P-001"

$.policies[0].title: "Critical outage escalation"

$.policies[0].rule: "P1 incidents affecting more than 5,000 meters must be escalated to GridOps within 10 minutes and to the regulator within 45 minutes if restoration estimate exceeds 2 hours."

$.policies[0].owner: "GridOps Lead"

$.policies[0].active: true

[]

Document: 09_aquila_nested_corpus
Section: $ > policies > [1]

$.policies[1].id: "P-002"

$.policies[1].title: "Data retention"

$.policies[1].rule: "Raw telemetry is retained for 18 months. Aggregated hourly metrics are retained for 7 years. Customer-identifiable exports must expire after 30 days."

$.policies[1].owner: "Data Governance"

$.policies[1].active: true

[]

Document: 09_aquila_nested_corpus
Section: $ > policies > [2]

$.policies[2].id: "P-003"

$.policies[2].title: "Maintenance freeze"

$.policies[2].rule: "No non-emergency transformer maintenance may be started during the June peak-load freeze window unless approved by both Operations and Compliance."

$.policies[2].owner: "Maintenance Director"

$.policies[2].active: true

[]

Document: 09_aquila_nested_corpus
Section: $ > policies > [3]

$.policies[3].id: "P-004"

$.policies[3].title: "Password rotation exception"

$.policies[3].rule: "Service accounts used by field gateways rotate every 90 days, except offline substations in satellite mode which rotate at the next successful sync within 14 days."

$.policies[3].owner: "Security Engineering"

$.policies[3].active: true

[]

$.policies[4].rule: "AI triage suggestions are advisory. Human dispatchers must confirm safety classification before a field crew is assigned."

$.policies[4].owner: "Service Desk Manager"

$.policies[4].active: true

parent_chunks.text:
Document: RAG Robust Format Test Corpus
Section: RAG Robust Format Test Corpus

RAG Robust Format Test Corpus

Generated on 2026-05-31. These files are synthetic enterprise-style fixtures for testing ingestion, parsing, normalization, chunking, metadata extraction, embedding, retrieval, reranking, and answer grounding.

Document: RAG Robust Format Test Corpus
Section: RAG Robust Format Test Corpus > Included formats

Included formats

TXT: long plain-text operational handbook with logs and QA pairs.

MD: product knowledge base with front matter, tables, code blocks, nested lists, and footnotes.

MARKDOWN: security runbook with Mermaid, admonitions, HTML, YAML, and long paragraphs.

PDF: audit report with multi-page prose, tables, headers/footers, and log-like preformatted text.

DOCX: procedure document with headings, tables, bullets, page break, headers/footers.

PPTX: generated separately; slide deck with architecture, tables, roadmap, speaker notes, and chart-like content.

XLSX: generated separately; workbook with multiple sheets, formulas, validation-style categories, and incident rows.

CSV: 180-row transaction-style file with quoted commas, multiline fields, unicode, and numeric columns.

JSON: nested corpus with policies, incidents, assets, nulls, booleans, unicode, and long text.

metadata.structure_key: heading:RAG Robust Format Test Corpus > Included formats

parent_chunks.text:
Document: RAG Robust Format Test Corpus
Section: RAG Robust Format Test Corpus > Suggested parser checks

Suggested parser checks

Preserve exact numeric facts: 10 minutes, 14 days, 30 days, 45 minutes, 90 days, 18 months, 7 years.

Preserve source metadata: filename, format, heading path, page/slide/sheet/row where available.

Keep table header context attached to each table row.

Avoid mixing code/log blocks with narrative paragraphs.

Detect ambiguity: feeder, breaker, tenant.

Test multi-format answer grounding by asking the same question across TXT, MD, PDF, DOCX, XLSX, CSV, JSON, and PPTX.

metadata.structure_key: heading:RAG Robust Format Test Corpus > Suggested parser checks
